title: Democrafty
description: This is a little modpack I made because I love the 23w13a_or_b April Fools snapshot version.
body:
This is a little modpack I made because I love the 23w13a_or_b April Fools snapshot version, and I couldn't find any modpacks for this version. This modpack just makes the game a bit easier to play without adding more content. I couldnt find any modpacks at all, but someone has to be the first and i guess thats me.

Current mods:
- Architectury API | architectury
- Cloth Config API | shedaniel
- Fabric API | modmuss50
- Roughly Enough Items (REI) | shedaniel
- Simple Voice Chat | henkelmax
- SpeedRunIGT | RedLime
- VoxelMap | fantahund
- Zume | Nolij
